prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约34700名、8005名、32723名、107891名、22932名。2024年因护理学专业组出现断档导致位次异常暴跌至10万+，2025年已大幅回升至约22932名，回归正常区间。近两年（2024–2025）位次从异常低点快速反弹，2025年基准位次约22932名；该校在广西物理类招生计划：2021年37人、2022年29人、2023年28人、2024年29人、2025年32人；2026年计划增至34人（较2025年扩招2人，增幅约6.25%）。扩招意味着竞争压力略有缓解，对位次有轻微下移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津医科大学是211工程大学、国家双一流建设高校，也是全国唯一一所211医科大学。软科中国大学排名2026年约第60名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年第61→2026年第60），在医药类院校中位居前列；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录。抖音综合热度排名第78位（评价为“一般”），短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现报考关注度骤升或骤降的信号；天津医科大学作为211医科大学，临床医学、药学、护理学等学科实力突出，在全国医药类院校中具有较高声誉，对有志于学医的考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度持续偏热（2024年），护理学热度也有所上升；广西2026年物理类考生估算约26.66万人，较2025年增加约2.35%，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧。省控线方面，广西物理类本科批2024年371分、2025年370分，基本持平；天津医科大学位于天津市，属于直辖市异地招生，在广西的招生占比不高（约2–3%），跨省报考的地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约22932名、2026年物理类计划扩招6.25%（位次下移）、广西物理类考生增加约2.35%（位次上移）以及医学类专业热度持续偏热等因素，扩招与考生增加的作用方向相反但扩招幅度更大，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有后移（位次数字增大，竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约23992名，区间23492–24492名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 医学影像学
- 眼视光医学
- 药学类（药学/药物制剂/临床药学）
- 预防医学
- 生物医学工程
- 生物信息学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学
- 医学检验技术
- 医学影像技术
- 康复治疗学
- 生物制药。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约23992名，区间23492–24492名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主（如医学影像学、药学类、预防医学），一档专业（临床5+3、口腔5+3）需位次明显优于区间下限方可冲刺，三档专业（护理学、医学技术类）可作为保底选择。临床医学类专业热度持续偏热，竞争激烈，建议结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 34,700, 8,005, 32,723, 107,891, and 22,932 respectively. In 2024, due to a gap in the nursing major group, the ranking dropped abnormally to over 100,000, but in 2025 it rebounded significantly to about 22,932, returning to a normal range. In the past two years (2024–2025), the ranking quickly rebounded from an abnormal low, with a baseline ranking of about 22,932 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi for the Physics Category: 37 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 32 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 34 (an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, a growth of about 6.25%). The expansion means slightly reduced competition pressure, leading to a slight downward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a 211 Project university, a national double first-class construction university, and the only 211 medical university in the country. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 60th in 2026, with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 61st in 2021 to 60th in 2026), ranking among the top in medical institutions. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or admission gaps. The comprehensive heat ranking on Douyin is 78th (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no sudden increase or decrease in application attention. As a 211 medical university, Tianjin Medical University has strong disciplines such as clinical medicine, pharmacy, and nursing, and holds a high reputation among medical institutions nationwide, providing sustained appeal to students aspiring to study medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology continue to be highly popular socially (2024), and nursing popularity has also increased. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Guangxi in 2026 is about 266,600, an increase of about 2.35% compared to 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the larger candidate pool. Regarding provincial control lines, the Guangxi Physics Category undergraduate batch was 371 points in 2024 and 370 points in 2025, essentially stable. Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin, a municipality directly under the central government, and recruits from other provinces, with a low proportion of enrollment in Guangxi (about 2–3%), so the influence of regional preference in cross-provincial applications is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of about 22,932 in 2025, the 6.25% expansion of the Physics Category plan in 2026 (downward shift in ranking), the approximately 2.35% increase in Physics Category examinees in Guangxi (upward shift in ranking), and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the expansion and the increase in examinees have opposite effects but the expansion is larger. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2025 (ranking number increases, competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 23,992, with a range of 23,492 to 24,492.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Medical Imaging
- Optometry and Ophthalmology
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy/Pharmaceutical Preparations/Clinical Pharmacy)
- Preventive Medicine
- Biomedical Engineering
- Bioinformatics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Nursing
- Medical Laboratory Technology
- Medical Imaging Technology
- Rehabilitation Therapy
- Biopharmaceuticals.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 23,992, range 23,492–24,492. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Medical Imaging, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine). Tier 1 majors (Clinical 5+3, Stomatology 5+3) require a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range to attempt. Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Medical Technology) can serve as safe choices. Clinical medicine majors remain highly popular with intense competition; it is advisable to position yourself reasonably based on your ranking.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2025年历史类首次有录取数据，最低录取位次约15877名（仅护理学1个专业招生）。此前2021–2024年该校在广西未招收文科/历史类考生，缺乏历史走势参考；2025年历史类招生计划仅2人（护理学专业）；2026年招生计划文件中未包含历史类数据，视为计划持平。由于招生人数极少，位次波动敏感度较高。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津医科大学是211工程大学、国家双一流建设高校，软科2026年排名约第60名，在医药类院校中位居前列，对文科考生报考医学相关专业有品牌吸引力；该校近年声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情。抖音热度一般，未出现报考关注度异常波动；护理学为天津医科大学优势学科之一，在第五轮学科评估中护理学获评较高等级，专业实力有保障。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 护理学专业社会热度2024年评估为“推荐”，就业前景良好，人才需求稳定；广西2026年历史类考生估算约12.54万人，较2025年增加约5.28%，考生规模扩大使竞争加剧。省控线方面，广西历史类本科批2024年400分、2025年402分，基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约15877名、2026年招生计划持平、广西历史类考生增加约5.28%以及护理学专业热度偏热等因素，考生增加是主要影响因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有后移（位次数字增大，竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约16177名，区间15677–16677名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 护理学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类仅护理学一个招生专业，位次在预测区间内（15677–16677名）均有录取机会。由于招生计划仅2人，位次波动风险较大，建议位次优于区间上限的考生积极报考，位次接近区间下限的考生可作为冲刺志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the History Category has admission data for the first time, with the lowest admission rank approximately 15877 (only one major, Nursing, enrolling). Previously from 2021 to 2024, the university did not admit liberal arts/history category students in Guangxi, lacking historical trend reference; the 2025 History Category enrollment plan is only 2 students (Nursing major); the 2026 enrollment plan document does not include History Category data, considered as unchanged plan. Due to the extremely small number of enrolled students, rank fluctuations are highly sensitive.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a 211 Project university and a national double first-class construction university, ranked approximately 60th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, leading among medical institutions, with brand appeal for liberal arts candidates applying for medical-related majors; its reputation has been stable in recent years with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average, with no abnormal fluctuations in application attention; Nursing is one of the advantageous disciplines of Tianjin Medical University, receiving a high rating in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, ensuring professional strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Nursing major in 2024 is assessed as 'recommended', with good employment prospects and stable talent demand; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Guangxi in 2026 is approximately 125,400, an increase of about 5.28% compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Regarding the provincial control line, the Guangxi History Category undergraduate batch was 400 points in 2024 and 402 points in 2025, essentially unchanged.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of approximately 15877, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 5.28% increase in Guangxi History Category candidates, and the relatively high popularity of the Nursing major, the increase in candidates is the main influencing factor. It is expected that the lowest admission rank in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025 (rank number increases, competition slightly intensifies). The predicted lowest rank is approximately 16177, with a range of 15677 to 16677.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The History Category only has one major, Nursing, with admission opportunities within the predicted rank range (15677–16677). Due to the enrollment plan of only 2 students, rank fluctuation risk is high. It is recommended that candidates with ranks better than the upper limit of the range actively apply, while those with ranks near the lower limit can consider it as a reach choice.
